search_queries_used: official respiratory guideline respiratory medication review
candidate_sources_rejected: adjacent respiratory guidance generalized into a complete respiratory medication review pathway
automatic diagnosis, investigation, treatment, medication, dose, procedure, referral, escalation, or discharge instructions
search snippets, landing pages, and broad source-family matches without an exact applicable section
rejection_reasons: Only the reviewed exact domains apply; remaining respiratory medication review content lacks exact support.
Autonomous clinical output is outside this documentation-only research programme and was not mapped.
Only opened exact official documents and directly applicable sections were accepted as evidence.
population_applicability: People with relevant respiratory medication review history, findings and clinician decisions entered.
setting_applicability: Partial for clinician-led asthma or COPD medicine review; medicine selection and dosing remain unsupported.
UAE_applicability: NICE guidance requires UAE respiratory, prescribing and pharmacy adaptation.
recency_verification: The cited official documents and exact registered sections were reviewed on 2026-07-18.
superseded_check: The registered official-source status was checked; no newer replacement was identified in the source record.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports structured clinician-led medicine review for respiratory medication review; no decision is generated.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports structured review of all medicines, views, understanding, concerns, questions, adherence context, adverse-reaction or side-effect context, monitoring, and circumstances for seeking professional advice.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports benefit-harm and preference discussion for respiratory medication review; no decision is generated.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documenting the person’s desired involvement, values, preferences, and clinician-completed discussion of treatment options, benefits and harms without generating a medicine decision.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports asthma-control monitoring for respiratory medication review; no decision is generated.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports review of symptoms, time off work or school, reliever use, systemic steroid courses, admissions or emergency attendance, validated control questionnaires, peak flow, FeNO, adherence, inhaler technique, smoking or vaping, occupational, psychosocial, seasonal and environmental factors, and response to treatment change.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports COPD follow-up context for respiratory medication review; no decision is generated.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports at least annual review of smoking, breathlessness, exercise tolerance, exacerbations, pulmonary rehabilitation, complications, medicine effects, inhaler technique, referral need, FEV1 and FVC, BMI, MRC dyspnoea, oxygen saturation, cor pulmonale, nutrition, mood, and social needs.

unresolved_source_gaps: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Diagnosis, medicine, device, dose, schedule, adherence, technique, benefit, adverse effects, interactions, control, decision and follow-up remain absent.
No diagnosis, risk conclusion, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for respiratory medication review.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
